name: HWR_CAT_CATEGORY_VL
query: SELECT B.CATEGORY_ID, B.CATEGORY_KEY, B.CATEGORY_TYPE, B.IS_SEEDED_DATA, B.IS_ACTIVE, T.DISPLAY_TEXT, T.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_CAT_CATEGORY_B B, HWR_CAT_CATEGORY_TL T WHERE B.CATEGORY_ID = T.CATEGORY_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
